title: Group Editors offices closed for the holidays
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Group Editors...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Group Editors would like to wish our readers a merry Christmas and happy new year.


> Our offices will be closed from 20 December until 6 January 2025.


Keep safe if you will be traveling.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
